title: Generative Meaning Game
genericDescription: Use generation to produce meaning, not filler; curate output boundaries; make variation interpretable.
specificDescription: Build a game where generated text, images, levels, music, rules, or events create different interpretations across playthroughs. Include controls for reviewing or constraining output.
gradingRubric: 30 pts generative design; 20 pts interpretive variation; 20 pts constraint/curation; 15 pts technical stability; 15 pts reflection.
